Makera Launches Cyclone Dust Collector: The Must-Buy Solution for Cleaner Desktop Fabrication Makera, the pioneer of intelligent desktop CNC (Computer Numerical Control) solutions, is expanding its ecosystem with the launch of a new product: the Makera Cyclone Dust Collector. But unlike their previous launches, including the Carvera and Carvera Air, this one is not a new milling machine, instead an accessory which advances usability for all desktop subtractive manufacturing processes.
